parameters.query:
INSERT INTO jsonkb_changes (entity_type, entity_id, entity_slug, jsonkb_file_path, content_hash)
VALUES (
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_id}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb_file_path}}',
  '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.provenance.content_hash}}'
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

SELECT
  c.id,
  c.name,
  COALESCE(
    c.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(c.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug
FROM companies c
ORDER BY c.name;

SELECT
  c.id,
  c.source,
  c.source_id,
  c.name,
  COALESCE(
    c.metadata->>'slug',
    lower(regexp_replace(c.name, '[^a-zA-Z0-9]+', '-', 'g'))
  ) AS slug,

  -- metadata scope (ONLY from companies.metadata)
  (c.metadata->>'is_item_manufacturer')::int    AS meta_is_item_manufacturer,
  (c.metadata->>'is_vehicle_manufacturer')::int AS meta_is_vehicle_manufacturer,
  c.metadata->>'industry'  AS meta_industry,
  c.metadata->>'nickname'  AS meta_nickname,

  -- NEW: vehicle count (deterministic, Phase-5 join rule)
  (
    SELECT COUNT(*)
    FROM vehicles v
    WHERE v.company_uex_id = c.source_id
  ) AS vehicle_count

FROM companies c
WHERE c.id = '{{$json["id"]}}';
SELECT content_hash FROM jsonkb_store WHERE entity_slug = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.slug}}' AND entity_type = '{{$('Build JSONKB').item.json.jsonkb.entity_type}}'
